name: Marble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over hot water and set aside.
2. Cream shortening and sugar thoroughly.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with combined milk and vanilla. Beat until smooth after each addition.
5. Mix melted chocolate with half of the batter.
6. Pour 1/3 of the plain batter into a greased and floured 9-cup Mini-Bundt pan.
7. Pour half of the chocolate batter on top of the plain batter.
8. Repeat, finishing with plain batter.
9. Cut a zig-zag pattern through the batter with a knife.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
11. Cool for 15 minutes before removing from pan.
12. Sift confectioners' sugar lightly over top.
